mapper.sql: SELECT sa.id, sa.user_id, u.username, COALESCE(sp.display_name, u.full_name) AS display_name, u.profile_picture_url AS user_photo, COALESCE(sp.is_verified, FALSE) AS is_verified, sa.entity_type, sa.entity_id, sa.entity_slug, sa.entity_title, sa.entity_cover, sa.cfi, sa.selected_text, sa.color, sa.note, sa.context_before, sa.context_after, sa.chapter_label, sa.visibility, sa.like_count, sa.comment_count, sa.reshare_count, sa.created_at, sa.updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO social_annotations (user_id, source_annotation_id, entity_type, entity_id, entity_slug, entity_title, entity_cover, cfi, selected_text, color, note, context_before, context_after, chapter_label, visibility, like_count, comment_count, reshare_count, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sourceAnnotationId}, #{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{entitySlug}, #{entityTitle}, #{entityCover}, #{cfi}, #{selectedText}, #{color}, #{note}, #{contextBefore}, #{contextAfter}, #{chapterLabel}, #{visibility}, 0, 0, 0, TRUE, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE social_annotations SET note = #{note}, color = #{color}, visibility = #{visibility}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE social_annotations SET is_active = FALSE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: , CASE WHEN #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} IS NOT NULL THEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM social_annotation_likes l WHERE l.annotation_id = sa.id AND l.user_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}) ELSE FALSE END AS is_liked_by_me, FALSE AS is_owner FROM social_annotations sa JOIN users u ON u.id = sa.user_id LEFT JOIN user_social_profiles sp ON sp.user_id = sa.user_id WHERE sa.is_active = TRUE AND sa.visibility = 'public' ORDER BY sa.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

, EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM social_annotation_likes l WHERE l.annotation_id = sa.id AND l.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}) AS is_liked_by_me, (sa.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}) AS is_owner FROM social_annotations sa JOIN users u ON u.id = sa.user_id LEFT JOIN user_social_profiles sp ON sp.user_id = sa.user_id WHERE sa.is_active = TRUE AND sa.user_id IN (SELECT following_id FROM user_follows WHERE follower_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}) AND sa.visibility IN ('public','followers') ORDER BY sa.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} IS NOT NULL THEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM social_annotation_likes l WHERE l.annotation_id = sa.id AND l.user_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}) ELSE FALSE END AS is_liked_by_me, (sa.user_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}) AS is_owner FROM social_annotations sa JOIN users u ON u.id = sa.user_id LEFT JOIN user_social_profiles sp ON sp.user_id = sa.user_id WHERE sa.user_id = #{profileUserId} AND sa.is_active = TRUE AND (sa.visibility = 'public' OR sa.user_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} OR (sa.visibility = 'followers' AND #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM user_follows WHERE follower_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND following_id = #{profileUserId} )) ) ORDER BY sa.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} IS NOT NULL THEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM social_annotation_likes l WHERE l.annotation_id = sa.id AND l.user_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}) ELSE FALSE END AS is_liked_by_me, (sa.user_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}) AS is_owner FROM social_annotations sa JOIN users u ON u.id = sa.user_id LEFT JOIN user_social_profiles sp ON sp.user_id = sa.user_id WHERE sa.entity_type = #{entityType} AND sa.entity_id = #{entityId} AND sa.is_active = TRUE AND sa.visibility = 'public' ORDER BY sa.like_count DESC, sa.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM social_annotations WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = TRUE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM social_annotations WHERE entity_type = #{entityType} AND entity_id = #{entityId} AND is_active = TRUE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM social_annotations WHERE is_active = TRUE AND visibility = 'public'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO social_annotation_likes (annotation_id, user_id, created_at) VALUES (#{annotationId}, #{userId}, NOW()) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM social_annotation_likes WHERE annotation_id = #{annotationId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM social_annotation_likes WHERE annotation_id = #{annotationId} AND user_id = #{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE social_annotations SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE social_annotations SET like_count = GREATEST(0,like_count-1) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE social_annotations SET reshare_count = reshare_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO social_annotation_comments (annotation_id, user_id, parent_id, content, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{annotationId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, FALSE, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE social_annotation_comments SET content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE social_annotation_comments SET is_deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.annotation_id, c.user_id, u.username, u.profile_picture_url AS user_photo, c.parent_id, c.content, (c.user_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}) AS is_owner, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM social_annotation_comments c JOIN users u ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE c.annotation_id = #{annotationId} AND c.parent_id IS NULL AND c.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE social_annotations SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE social_annotations SET comment_count = GREATEST(0,comment_count-1) WHERE id = #{id}
